    <item>
      <title>LeBron James' big moments lifting Lakers to commanding series lead vs. Rockets</title>
      <description>A series many thought would go one way due to key injuries has gone the completely other direction. With their come-from-behind Game 3 win on Friday night, it's the Los Angeles Lakers who have a commanding 3-0 series lead over the Houston Rockets. </description>
      <pubDate>24 Apr 2026 22:31:30 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/lebron_james_big_moments_lifting_lakers_to_commanding_series_lead_vs_rockets/s1_13132_43768268</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/lebron_james_big_moments_lifting_lakers_to_commanding_series_lead_vs_rockets/s1_13132_43768268</guid>

      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/8/2/8215afe15cd36d9b9fa50fe85b6650b47e47442f/thumb_16x9/lebron-james-leads-lakers-commanding-series-lead.jpg">
        <media:credit> Troy Taormina-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) controls the ball as Los Angeles Lakers guard Austin Reaves (15) defends during the first quarter of Game 3 of the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Toyota Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>

    <item>
      <title>What factors will decide the Lakers-Rockets playoff series?</title>
      <description>When the Los Angeles Lakers' two leading scorers, Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves, went down against the Oklahoma City Thunder on April 2, many speculated their playoff hopes were diminished and that a short series was inevitable. Instead, they're up 2-0 on the Rockets. What will determine how the rest of the series plays out?</description>

    <item>
      <title>Thunder's Game 2 win over Suns overshadowed by Jalen Williams injury</title>
      <description>The Oklahoma City Thunder took a 2-0 lead over the Phoenix Suns following Wednesday's 120-107 win, but it was not without a key injury and poor execution down the stretch.</description>
      <pubDate>23 Apr 2026 13:41:48 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/thunders_game_2_win_over_suns_overshadowed_by_jalen_williams_injury/s1_13132_43759423</link>
